# `fixtures` tools

## `fixtures.list`

`implemented` · `read-only`

List rootfs fixture catalog entries (provider, name, arch). Requires a valid token.

## `fixtures.validate`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Validate the resolved fixture catalog and list its profiles. Requires a valid token.
